summary: Vietnamese-language research report that: (1) Interprets chat screenshots from a Vietnamese community discussing Gemini CLI account verification and multi-account farming via CLIProxyAPI, (2) Explains what EasyCLI is (Tauri v2 desktop GUI for CLIProxyAPI), (3) Provides a detailed feature comparison table between EasyCLI desktop app and the localhost:8080 web dashboard, (4) Recommends using both tools together — EasyCLI for process management/auto-start and the web dashboard for monitoring/custom integration.
